description: Canonical Bardock-Goku father-son related_characters bidirectional mirror-closure. Bardock is canonically the father of Kakarot/Son Goku per Dragon Ball Minus (Toriyama, 2014), Dragon Ball Super: Broly (Toei, 2018), and the 1990 TV special Dragon Ball Z: Bardock — The Father of Goku. The wave-69 bardock.md commission listed son-goku in related_characters at creation time; son-goku.md did not previously list bardock because no bardock node existed pre-wave-69. This is the canonical mirror-closure: both nodes are equal character-layer nodes, both endpoints traversable from either side, parent-child relation is one of the franchise's most-canonical character-relations. Standard Edgelord professional sigh applies. The mirror is structural, not optional — son-goku's narrative-arc is canonically Bardock's posthumous succession (the Super Saiyan prophecy Frieza preemptively-genocided the Saiyan workforce to prevent ultimately materializes in Bardock's son, who returns to confront Frieza in the Namek-Frieza-Saga final-arc and defeats him as the canonical Super Saiyan Goku per the 1990 TV special's closing-image intercut). Bundle copy referencing the canonical worker's-son-becomes-the-future-the-worker-died-for succession-narrative thesis indexes both nodes.
